site.name: Mrityunjay Raj
site.tagline: CSE • BIT Mesra • AI Engineer • 5x Hackathon Winner
site.description: Mrityunjay Raj - Computer Science student at BIT Mesra, 5x Hackathon Winner, AI Engineer, Open Source Contributor.
site.about: An engineer and open source contributor specializing in AI Systems and Full-Stack Development.

highlights: Implementing pack file support for the next-generation borg2 storage backend (Borgbackup Pack Files for borg2)
Contributing to product development and engineering initiatives as an Associate Software Engineer
BorgBackup (Borg): Authored 33 PRs optimizing CI/CD pipelines, Python 3.12 compatibility, and resolving complex timezone bugs
BorgBase (Vorta): Authored 16 PRs optimizing CI/CD pipelines, Python 3.12 compatibility, and resolving complex timezone bugs, completing 2 full projects
OSSF (CVE Binary Tool): Resolved critical Windows crash loops involving sqlite3 databases via filesystem optimizations
Engineered a scalable RESTful API suite and credit-based billing microservice handling 500+ concurrent transactions using Node.js and FastAPI
Architected a multi-tenant notification system across WhatsApp, email, and web portals using event-driven architecture with message queuing
Optimized PostgreSQL schemas (118+ tables) via advanced query tuning and indexing, improving OCR accuracy by 25%
Developed features for the official academic platform to streamline academic management for students, faculty, and administration
Contributed to building a comprehensive system for managing academic workflows at BIT Mesra
Built an AI aggregator platform integrating LLMs, MCP tools, local file systems, and image generation APIs using Node.js and Next.js
Implemented multi-model support enabling seamless switching between Gemini, GPT, Claude, and other LLMs through a unified interface
Reduced model inference latency by 30% by implementing Redis caching strategies and asynchronous processing queues
Contributed to software development initiatives enhancing operational efficiency and scalability for an innovative scrap recycling platform

projects.title: GSoC Espionage
projects.description: GitHub PR analytics dashboard with 1.4k+ active users visualizing merge rates, contributor stats, and activity timelines for any repository. Features branch filtering, customizable time ranges, CSV/JSON data exports, GSoC 2026 organization lists, and theme support.
